title: Earthy Smoky Mediterranean Snow Peas Grill
description: A quick, crunchy Mediterranean dish featuring smoky snow peas, toasted pine nuts, and crumbled feta, perfect for a gluten‑free date night.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium‑high heat.
In a bowl, toss snow peas with olive oil, smoked paprika, sumac, salt, and pepper until evenly coated.
Spread the peas in a single layer on the grill and cook for 3–4 minutes, turning occasionally until edges are lightly charred.
Remove the peas and transfer to a serving dish.
Drizzle a little extra olive oil, sprinkle toasted pine nuts, and crumble feta over the top.
Add lemon zest for brightness and a final sprinkle of salt if needed.
Serve immediately while hot, with extra feta or a splash of balsamic glaze if desired.
